ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] Check out page 133 in the 303 Tween-Approved Exercises and Active Games book for outdoor activities you can do if the weather is warm where you live. The pool exercises are especially family-friendly.
